name: Rehabilitation Expenditure Exception for Bond Financing

eligibility.description: The taxpayer must incur rehabilitation expenditures equal to at least 15% of the cost of the building (or 100% for other structures) within 2 years of acquisition or bond issuance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Permits the use of tax-exempt bond proceeds for the acquisition of existing buildings if a minimum amount is spent on rehabilitation (15% of acquisition cost).
